plugins.name: Profiles
plugins.description: Multi-user accounts + per-user My Library shelves, admin user management, and self-service password change. No core fork.
plugins.author: shuff57

plugins.name: Inline Player
plugins.description: In-app audiobook player for Listenarr â€” chapters, bookmarks, resume, and a Listen library page.
plugins.author: shuff57

plugins.name: Library Stats
plugins.description: A library + listening dashboard: totals, top authors/narrators, and (when the player plugin is installed) in-progress/finished counts.
plugins.author: shuff57

plugins.name: Theme
plugins.description: Inject custom CSS into Listenarr at runtime. Includes accent presets, a full CSS editor, and Apply/Save/Reset controls. Saved themes persist across reloads.
plugins.author: shuff57

plugins.name: Library Export
plugins.description: Export your Listenarr audiobook library to JSON or CSV with a single click.
plugins.author: shuff57

plugins.name: Backup
plugins.description: Download your Listenarr config directory as a zip. Admin-gated.
plugins.author: shuff57

plugins.name: Discover
plugins.description: Suggests audiobooks you might like — Audible search seeded by the authors AND genres you already own, filtered against your library, with a one-click hand-off into Add New.
plugins.author: shuff57

plugins.name: Health
plugins.description: File-integrity scan: walks every audiobook file on disk and flags missing / zero-byte / unreadable files â€” beyond what Wanted (metadata) and Systemâ†’Storage (disk space) show. Backend dll; admin-gated.
plugins.author: shuff57
